metadata.name: Teaching Building - TEXT-ONLY seed SpatialGraph
metadata.description: Hand-crafted SpatialGraph derived STRICTLY from the natural-language description in teaching_building_ground_floor.txt. The reference image floor_plan/demo_floor.png was NOT consulted. Area ratios computed analytically from the cell sizes listed in the text. Used to ablate the contribution of the image input vs. the textual layout description.
